lessons.key: ac_gap::test localstorage unavailability for in memory language fallback by mocking setitem to throw and asserting the language still applies without propagating the error
lessons.text: Test localStorage unavailability for in-memory language fallback by mocking setItem to throw and asserting the language still applies without propagating the error.

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::assert runtime missing key fallback behavior with an unknown key not just that fallbacklng config equals the expected locale
lessons.text: Assert runtime missing-key fallback behavior with an unknown key, not just that fallbackLng config equals the expected locale.

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::when a spec ac defines a precise css property value aspect ratio overflow font color token for a css only fix add a targeted guard assertion in design guards spec ts for that exact value guard visual alone creates gaps when visual is ci deferred and no existing guard covers the specific property
lessons.text: When a spec AC defines a precise CSS property value (aspect-ratio, overflow, font/color token) for a CSS-only fix, add a targeted guard assertion in design-guards.spec.ts for that exact value. Guard+visual alone creates gaps when visual is CI-deferred and no existing guard covers the specific property.
evidence: UXUI-07 AC1/AC2, UXUI-02 AC2, UXUI-06 AC3, UXUI-14 AC3
